name: Honey-Mustard Pork Scallopini
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten the pork chops to 1/8-inch thickness.
2. In a small bowl, combine honey and mustard; brush over both sides of each pork chop.
3. In a shallow dish, mix cracker and bread crumbs.
4. Add the coated pork chops to the mixture and turn to coat evenly.
5. Heat vegetable oil and butter in a skillet.
6. Fry the pork chops for 2-3 minutes on each side or until crispy and juices run clear.
